strongTriggersProse: Food, snacks and casual eating talk
exclusions: Dog-health or toxicity questions; delivery cost; Collie-specific diet question
exampleLine: Food detected. I could continue, but professional integrity requires a Labrador.
contextCarried: Carry original food term and any product interest.

strongTriggersProse: Explicit request for a joke or deliberately silly entertainment
exclusions: Serious safety or factual questions containing the word funny
exampleLine: This requires the comedy operator. Standards may fall during transfer.
contextCarried: Boxer opens on the requested joke type.

strongTriggersProse: Investigation, odd history or suspicious detail
exclusions: General British history that Collie can answer
exampleLine: You need the investigative department. Try not to encourage him.
contextCarried: Carry the topic and desired page.

strongTriggersProse: Mathematics, structured general knowledge or planning
exclusions: Food arithmetic or simple product price question
exampleLine: This sounds clever again. I’m sending you back to the clever one.

strongTriggersProse: Deep history, suspicious objects or investigation
exampleLine: I’ve got a friend who loves digging into things. Sometimes literally.

strongTriggersProse: Formal general knowledge, rules or structured navigation
exampleLine: That needs the organised one, mate. Don’t tell him I said that.

exclusions: Mild insults that Terrier can handle
exampleLine: I know a dog with absolutely no standards. Perfect for this.

strongTriggersProse: Hidden session ceiling or deliberate comic ending
exampleLine: I’ll transfer you to our final operator.
